mapper.sql: SELECT e.equipment_id, e.equipment_code, e.equipment_name, e.category_id, c.category_name, e.model, e.serial_number, e.manufacturer, e.supplier, e.purchase_date, e.original_value, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, e.install_location, e.equipment_status, e.responsible_id, u.nick_name as responsible_name, e.equipment_image, e.attachment_url, e.status, e.del_flag, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, e.remark FROM dms_equipment e LEFT JOIN dms_equipment_category c ON e.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON e.responsible_id = u.user_id
mapper.delete: UPDATE dms_equipment SET del_flag = '2' WHERE equipment_id IN #{equipmentId}
